title: Hasbro Puts Newly Acquired TV Brand Entertainment One (eOne) Back Up For Sale

title: Ancora Issues Statement of Support Regarding Hasbro's Decision to Pursue a Sale of eOne TV and Film
text: CLEVELAND--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Ancora Holdings Group, LLC (together with its affiliates, “Ancora” or we”) today issued the below statement regarding Hasbro, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: HAS) (“Hasbro” or the “Company”) announcement that it has initiated a sale process for its eOne TV and film business.

title: Hasbro Puts EOne Film, TV Business Up For Sale
text: Hasbro said its board has authorized a sale process for the part of its eOne TV and film business not directly supporting its branded entertainment strategy following a review of the company's business initiated by new CEO Chris Cocks.

title: Hasbro to start sale process of part of eOne TV and film business
text: Hasbro Inc. HAS, -4.67% said Thursday that average a strategic review of its business, the toy maker's board of directors have OK'd a sale process for part of its Entertainment One (eOne) TV and film business. Hasbro said it will keep the capability to develop and produce animation, digital shorts and scripted TV and films.

title: Hasbro Initiates Sale Process for eOne TV and Film Business
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a global branded entertainment leader, today announced that, in connection with the Company's strategic review process led by its new CEO, Chris Cocks, the Board of Directors has authorized a sale process for the part of its eOne TV and film business not directly supporting the Company's Branded Entertainment strategy. Hasbro will maintain the capability to develop and produce animation, digital shorts, scripted TV and theatrical films for audiences related to core Hasbro IP.

title: Hasbro, Mattel stocks suffer as Target sees toy sales slow
text: Target's earnings woes spilled over to shares of toy makers Hasbro and Mattel after the retailer said it saw a sharp slowdown in toy sales in October.

title: What to Know About One Analyst's Grim Warning for Hasbro (HAS) Stock
text: Though shares of toy manufacturer Hasbro (NASDAQ: HAS ) popped higher on Tuesday morning, they've been choppy over recent sessions. Yesterday, a Bank of America analyst warned that Hasbro is effectively killing its golden goose through poor product strategy decisions.

title: Hasbro CFO to retire
text: Toy maker Hasbro Inc. HAS, -5.59% on Wednesday said that Chief Financial Officer Deborah Thomas plans to retire. She will hold that position until the company finds a successor, and will stay on as an adviser “for a period thereafter to ensure a smooth transition.
